hero.title: Industrial Capacitors for High-Frequency Power Systems
hero.subtitle: Engineered for induction heating, melting, furnaces and power factor correction — built for continuous heavy-duty operation.

features.title: Built for the World's Most Demanding Applications

items.subtitle: Induction Furnace Capacitors
items.title: Induction Heating
items.body: Resonant tank capacitors for series and parallel circuits in medium and high-frequency induction heating and melting systems. Water-cooled or dry-type.

items.subtitle: Pulsed Power Capacitors
items.title: Pulse Capacitors
items.body: High-energy, fast-discharge capacitors for nuclear fusion research and pulsed power systems. Sub-microsecond discharge, up to 100kJ per shot.

items.subtitle: Power Factor Correction
items.title: High Voltage
items.body: Shunt capacitors and PFC banks for industrial power systems up to 35kV class. Reduces reactive power losses and improves grid stability.

applications.title: Matched to Your Application. Ready to Source.
applications.lead: Our products cover the specific technical requirements of industrial buyers across induction heating, power generation, and energy research.

items.title: Induction Heating OEMs
items.body: Resonant tank and high-frequency capacitors for manufacturers of induction heating and hardening equipment operating from 1kHz to 200kHz.

items.title: Metal Melting & Foundries
items.body: Coreless and channel induction furnace capacitor banks rated for continuous heavy-load melting of steel, aluminum, copper, and specialty alloys.

items.title: Plant & Process Engineers
items.body: Direct technical support for matching capacitor ratings — voltage, capacitance, frequency, cooling method — to your existing or new system design.

items.title: Industrial Sourcing & Procurement
items.body: Consistent supply, full export documentation, and order flexibility from prototype quantities through annual volume programs.

items.title: Power System Integrators
items.body: High-voltage shunt capacitors and PFC banks for industrial substations. Rated to GB/T 11024 and IEC 60871 for international projects.

items.title: Export & International OEMs
items.body: English-language technical documentation, export-ready packaging, and reliable delivery to over 50 countries. CE and RoHS support available.

trust.title: Engineered to Specification. Tested Before Delivery.
trust.lead: Every unit passes factory acceptance testing before shipment. Our processes follow stringent quality protocols across all product lines.

items.title: 100% Factory Acceptance Testing
items.body: Every capacitor is tested for high-voltage withstand, capacitance value, and dielectric loss angle (tan δ) prior to release. Test reports provided on request.

items.title: GB/T & IEC Compliant
items.body: Products manufactured to Chinese National Standard (GB/T) and IEC equivalent specifications for acceptance in international markets and export projects.

items.title: Full Technical Documentation
items.body: Datasheets, dimensional drawings, test certificates, and conformance documents provided with every order. Engineering clarification available.

items.title: Thermal & Electrical Durability
items.body: Stable capacitance across full operating temperature range, low dielectric losses, and proven service life under continuous industrial duty cycles.

steps.title: Identify Your Application
steps.body: Select the product line — induction heating, pulse power, or high-voltage PFC — based on your system type and operating frequency.

steps.title: Match Your Ratings
steps.body: Compare voltage (kV), capacitance (µF), current rating (A), frequency (kHz), and cooling method against your system specification.

steps.title: Review the Datasheet
steps.body: Download dimensional drawings and electrical parameters. Our engineering team is available for technical questions and custom requirements.

steps.title: Request a Quote
steps.body: Submit your application details, required ratings, quantity, and delivery location. We respond with pricing within one business day.

about_teaser.title: Decades of Expertise in Capacitor Technology
body: On Capacitor was founded on a simple principle: that precision-engineered capacitors for demanding industrial applications should be backed by real engineering support — not just a catalogue.

From our manufacturing facility, we design and produce capacitor systems that power induction furnaces, fusion research equipment, and industrial power grids — with full documentation and consistent quality on every order.

products_preview.title: Induction Heating. Pulse Power. High Voltage.
products_preview.lead: Three focused product lines, each engineered to the specific demands of its application — from metal foundries and fusion research to national grid substations.

cta.title: Ready to Power Your Next Project?
cta.body: Tell us your application, operating frequency, voltage, and capacitance requirements. Our team will respond within one business day.
